title: KENECT AI Project Config
description: Per-project configuration for a KENECT AI project (kenectai.json). Tells `kenectai add` which registry to pull items from and where to drop them in the project tree. Created by `kenectai init`; users may edit it to point at custom registries or reshape their project layout.

registry.description: Base URL of the registry to pull items from. Point at the official KENECT AI registry or a custom one.

paths.description: Target paths for each item type, relative to the project root.

assets.description: Where asset files (images, fonts, videos) land. Defaults to `assets`.
